Projects

Build logs, experiments, and teardowns using DST-sourced gear. Written in a direct engineering tone — what was built, why, what worked, what didn’t.

Bench Power Supply Build — LM317 Adjustable Regulator

2026-03-30 — power-supply, LM317, build-log

Building a simple adjustable bench power supply from scratch using an LM317 regulator. Covers schematic, PCB layout considerations, and measured output performance.

DhivanSTech

  • DhivanSTech

    DhivanSTech (DST) is an electronics brand supplying tested DIY maker components and test equipment via Amazon. We also document real builds, experiments, and engineering projects.
